name: Big Mouth Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Kielbasa sausage or turkey Kielbasa
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, simmer the mixed vegetables until done.
2. While they are cooking, melt 2 tablespoons of butter in a deep fry pan.
3. Slice the Kielbasa and then quarter each of the slices so there are four bite-size pieces.
4. Brown the Kielbasa in the butter.
5. Add the can of cream of mushroom soup to the meat and butter mixture.
6. Stir in milk until well combined, adjusting consistency to your liking.
7. Add the cooked vegetables and blend everything together.
8. Serve over rice.
